metadata.title: Steam Workshop Collection Parser
metadata.description: Collect Workshop IDs and Mod IDs from a Steam Workshop collection for a Project Zomboid server.

home.heading: Workshop Collection Parser
home.intro: Paste a link to a Steam Workshop collection for Project Zomboid. The tool will collect the Workshop ID and Mod ID for every mod and prepare ready-to-use lists for your server config.

warnings.no-mod-id: Mod ID not found in the description — check the mod page manually
warnings.multiple-mod-ids: Multiple Mod IDs — pick the ones you need
warnings.unavailable: Mod is unavailable (hidden, banned or deleted)

api.missingUrl: Provide a link to a Steam Workshop collection.

steam.progressCollection: Fetching the list of mods from the collection…
steam.invalidUrl: Could not recognize the collection link. Paste a URL like https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=... or a numeric ID.
steam.collectionNotFound: Collection not found or empty. Check the link and make sure the collection is public.
steam.unexpected: Unexpected error while processing the collection.
